feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Review Booklet Designer Add More Analytical Queries
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I wanted to expand the Review Booklet by adding my own queries. Unfortunately, when creating the Business Page and the Page, the following error is displayed. Even though I have made all the settings in Custom Analytical Queries and Services. 

 

In addition, I have also defined all fields as shown in the image above.

Does anyone know what could be causing the error?

regards,

Mert

entry.title: Query related to SAP Note-2270261
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am seeking one clarification about SAP Note 2270261.

In note it is mentioned that-With SAP S/4HANA 1511 the target for links and references in reports CJI3N, CJI4N, CN41, CNS0 is going to the single maintenance transaction CJ20N (Project Builder).and n case of custom code for special maintenance functions only, customer should consider to enable the custom code for the Project Builder transactions

I am not getting exactly what will be changing by target for links and  references in reports means and for what exactly need to consider to enable CJ20N from custom code perspective.

Awaiting more clear understanding about this . thanks.

Regards,

Prajakta

entry.title: KPI Modeler vs "Manage KPI and Reports" app
entry.content:
"KPI Modeler" vs "Manage KPI and Reports" app

 

- Are these two the same,

- is KPI modeler  older version..?

- Is KPI Modeler still relevant & avaialbe in latest 2022/23 versions..?

- What is the difference.?

- How to install KPI Modeler

Thanks a lot in Advance

Gaya3K

entry.title: Logic for schedule is frozen
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a one requirement such that A field indicating when the schedule is frozen should be added to the table (Power BI) which in turn data pulling from CDS View . (It would be worthwhile to just show the status when the schedule is frozen).

So in CDS view what logic have to be written for displaying as schedule is frozen like how can i display schedule is frozen for the Maintenance order or work orders?

below is the standard CDS view C_RSHMaintSchedFrozenOp .we will be creating a customizing cds view on top of this there i need a scneario how can i write a logic to be written for schedule is frozen?

 

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Spend Analysis by cost centre, display cost centre name
entry.content:
I am learning Spend analysis
I navigated to Query Browser -> C_PurchaseOrderValueQuery
I have made a simple year to date spend analysis by Company Code and Cost Centre (see image, if working below)
As you can see the cost centre are represented by the ID CH101500, the name of which is Engineering.

Is there a way to display the cost centre name, rather than the cost centre ID?
This would make the analysis much more user friendly to the wider business order

Thanks

Ian

entry.title: Populating CDS Parameter with Bex Variable Value
entry.content:
I am building a Bex query using 2CIFIGLBALCMPCUBE as the transient provider.  This provider is using I_GLAcctBalanceComprnCube as the underlying CDS view.  This view has parameters that I am trying to populate with Bex variables.  The issue is that when I run the query, I get errors saying that the variables have to have a unique value assigned.  The variables are all set as mandatory single values so I'm not sure why it will not get to the variable screen.  Is it possible to pass a Bex variable value as the CDS view parameter?  Any help would be greatly appreciated.

CDS View

Bex Query showing variables

Error returned from query

entry.title: Using GL Account Groups(KDH3) in CDS Views
entry.content: I am trying to use account groups that are created in KDH1 in CDS views.  However, the only hierarchies that are available are Financial Statement Versions created in OB58.  Is anyone aware of a way to use the account groups created in KDH1 in CDS views?  The specific scenario that I am working on is a report using consumption 2CIFIACTPLNJEIC which is using CDS view I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube.

entry.title: How to create custom analytical profit & loss query for current vs previous year
entry.content:
Hi All,

We need to generate Profit and loss statement query with planned and actuals for the current year vs previous year and we also need to have the Total Sales, Total Cost and Total Gross Profit as as header rows along with the FSV hierarchy.

I am deriving the values for actuals and planned from the standard cube I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube but not sure how to display the total sales, total cost and total gross profits at the top. Please suggest how this can be achieved.

Below the snapshot of the YTD Profit and Loss requirement. 

Thank you,

Manoj

SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics #SAP Custom Analytical Queries @Masaaki @mlauber

entry.title: Hiearchies that have been created in Fiori App F2918 dont work in Custom Analytical Query F1572
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

i am currently running into a very strange problem and i cannot find a solution. I have created a analytical query based on I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem and i created a Parameter for the user to select the hierarchy of GLAccount. This Parameter should select both the hierarchy that is used for the Filter on GLAccount and also for the display in the table. This works with some hierarchies but unfortuneately not for the hierarchies that our users have created in the App F2918 (Manage Global Hierarchies). After selecting one of these it is impossible to switch to another hierarchy afterwards. I checked ST22, SLG1 and SM21 and found no error messages.

I already checked the backend tables and it looks kind of weired thtat the hierarchies we created are named H109/... indicating that it is a GlAccount hierarchy but the backend tables show FSVN (Balance Sheet) as the hierarchy type. I am not sure if this is connected to the issue but i could reproduce this with standard consumption views as well. Would be great if one of you knows this issue already and can help me on this.

Best Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document App - S4HANA Custom Field Extension
entry.content:
Hello all ,

Clients requirement is to add a  Supplier Material field  within the Items section of "Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document " App, as the arrow in the image indicates.

 

And it is from the entity set “GR4PO_DL_Item” of gateway project MMIM_GR4PO_DL marked in above screenshot from SEGW  and it is not from the CDS view.

 

  1. We started by looking into the issue with Adapt UI to try to add the field that way. However, this did not work because the field does not exist.

 

  1. We tried using Custom Fields. There, we used the business contexts PO Item and Material Document Item. That did not work either.

Is there any way we could introduce the new field “Supplier Material” in the items section of the above app?

 

Please let me know your thoughts. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: CDS View Data extraction from KOH3 Internal Order Group
entry.content:
Dear experts,
I hope this message finds you well.
I have a request to enhance I_GLACCTBALANCECUBE by including the Internal Order Group, enabling end-users to select various hierarchy nodes from a selection tree similar to what is available in transaction code KOH3.
In the Order Groups (KOH3) tcode, the hierarchy can be displayed, but I have not been able to identify any direct table link to this transaction.
Could you please advise how I can implement this enhancement? Additionally, is there a CDS view available that displays Order Groups as seen in KOH3?
Do you know of any CDS views that serve as the equivalent to 0COORDER_0103_HIER and 0COORDER_TEXT?

Thank you for your support!

Best regards,

Pat

entry.title: Re: CDS View Data extraction from KOH3 Internal Order Group
entry.content:
Hi Pat,

I am also facing problems with the internal order groups while enhancing I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem. So far I found the information about the groups in these three tables: SETHEADER SETLEAF SETNODE

In each you should filter for setclass "0103" for internal order groups. While this is not the full answer, I hope you find it useful to some extend. If you find out more, please let me know any updates.

Best regards,

Niklas

entry.title: Not able to make the New column to show in front screen of a app based on Analytical Query CDS view
entry.content:
Hi all,

I got a requirement to add a new column in the existing fiori report.  This report is published as ODATA service using a CDS view in backend . This CDS view is Analytical query CDS view. 

But new column "Open Amount" what i added is not showing in front of the report, i need to select this from settings and make it available in the report. I want this to show by default in the report. I have even tried @ui.lineitem.position annotation as well, also priority as #HIGH that didnt work. 

 

Also i want to add one more selection field in this app, for that i dont see any selection field annotation used in the CDS view but still i am able to see there are some input fields in this app. Not sure how to it is added. I thought since it is a analytical query it must have created using "Custom Analytical Queries" app but i could'nt find this query view ( Z_JOURNAL_Q010) there neither.

I also checked if there is any metadata extension view created for this but there nothing found in where used list of this analytical query. Only change it accepts is to add a new field but none of the annotations to position this or selection field works for this . 

 

Please let me know how to position the new column by default without selecting it from settings and also add a selection field for this report. 

 

Thanks in advance!!

Regards,

Kameeswaran

entry.title: GL Account Hierarchy name does not appear correctly in FIORI Actual Apps eg: Projects - Actuals
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

GL Account Hierarchy name does not appear correctly in FIORI Actual Apps eg: Projects - Actuals, Cost Centers - Actuals, . . .

it show up like 1000X_XX_XX instead of H109/1000/X_XX_XX

Kindly help.

entry.title: Is it possible to set the "Key User Rel. State" of a CDS-View to Released?
entry.content: I want to create a custom cds view to create an analysis with embedded Analytics. The problem is that I'm not able to add an existing cds view to "Data Sources" in the fiori app "Custom CDS Views". The reason seems to be the fact that my existing cds view has the "Key User Rel. State" set to not released. Is it possible to change it to "released"?

entry.title: Predictive Quantity Contract Consumption
entry.content:
Dear Team,

when I use the app Quantity Contract Consumption (App ID is F2012) the predictive consumption percentage is always 0. I followed the steps of the best practice 1QR and trained and activate the model, but the percentage remains 0.

I found the SAP Note 2947933 with this issue and tried to implement the corrections. Unfortunately it was not relevant for our systems because we use the software component S4CORE 106.

Could you help with this issue?

Best regards.

entry.title: SSO Error in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help.

I have configured IAS as a proxy, and in IAS, I have set the Subject Name Identifier=employee_id

In Azure (OpenID Connection to IAS), I have added the employee_id to Additional Claims.

In the source system (Azure) in IPS, I have configured the transformation as follows:

{
"sourcePath": "$.employeeId",
"targetPath": "$.userName",
"correlationAttribute": true
}

Also in IPS transformation I replaced "sourcePath": "$.userPrincipalName" with "sourcePath": "$.employeeId".

Users are provisioned with IPS.

In IAS, the "Login Name" field for users receives the employee_id, for example, 1111. These users are then provisioned to SAC and have the employee_id (1111) in the "USER ID" field as well.

When I try to test SSO and select "Choose a user attribute to map to your Identity Provider" -> User attribute set = "USER ID", the user is not found in SAC.

The user accesses the SAC link and enters their email address. The user is authenticated in Azure, but in SAC, the user is not found.

I need help.

I can't solve this by myself.

Thank you very much !!!

entry.title: Fiori : subscribe report
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

many reports has SUBSCRIBE button.

When it will alert and how often it will send alert to us.

For example for report Contract Expiry.

entry.title: Custom Analytical Query- How to search using single mandatory filter out of many mandatory filters
entry.content:
Hi
I have Four mandatory filter fields in my Custom Analytical Query which is created using the "Custom Analytical Query" Fiori app. 

And I need to allow the user to run the query using any single or multiple field combinations of the available mandatory filter fields. 
Currently user have to select all four mandatory filters to search. If this is a Fiori app then I can define the filtration logic using JavaScript from the frontend.

Is there a way to do this?

entry.title: CDS View for Compliance Check: Which SAP User holds which values from an authorization object
entry.content:
Hi,

Requirement for compliance checks:
Is there a Standard CDS for Compliance checks, at best, listening all Users, Roles , Auth.objects and their values ?

Problem:
-Got some x100 SAP Users.
-The SAP users have a multitude of roles ( of course ...;).
-For compliance checks  I want to formulate a CDS view bringing
back all SAP users and the values of  a certain Role.

Example:
Got in many roles the authorization object F_BKPF_BUK

Want to have a list
SAP_USER   | BUKRS_VALUE
---------------+-----------------------+
MEUSER1      511
MEUSER2      803
..

or even better:

SAP_USER   | BUKRS_VALUE | AUTH_OBJECT | ROLE
---------------+-----------------------+---------------------+--------------------+
MEUSER1    | 511                      | F_BKPF_BUK   | Z1_M1_D_510
MEUSER2    | 803                      | F_BKPF_BUK   | Z1_M1_D_803
...

Solutions:
Standard CDS available ?
Any else ?

Demarcation:
Its  NOT searched how to authorize a CDS via a
CDS Auth. Object, for ex: ...(Bukrs) = aspect pfcg_auth(F_BKPF_BUK, BUKRS).

Thank You !

Best Wishes !
Martin
